channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Young collector nabs rare Paul Skenes card that could offer him a hefty haul in trade with Pirates
item.description: An 11-year-old collector in Los Angeles has scooped up a one-of-a-kind baseball card featuring National League Rookie of the Year Paul Skenes. Topps announced Tuesday that the card, which features the Pittsburgh Pirates pitcher’s autograph and a patch from a game-worn jersey, had been found.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 4 indicted in break-ins at luxury homes, but link to athlete burglaries unclear
item.description: Four men from Chile were indicted Tuesday in what the Ohio attorney general called a string of burglaries at multimillion-dollar homes, but he declined to say whether professional athletes were the targets.
item.dc:creator: JOHN SEEWER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Four players with San Diego ties to play at 2025 Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: The 2025 Farmers Insurance Open kicks off Wednesday morning at Torrey Pines Golf Course in La Jolla with a purse of $9.3 million up for grabs over the four-day event.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Brett Favre opens up about challenge of facing Trump in golf
item.description: Former NFL quarterback Brett Favre spoke about his experience playing with Trump in a post on Monday, saying, "Trump is REALLY GOOD and a competitor.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohio State celebrates and gets ready for all the changes coming to college football in 2025
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The early betting favorite to win next year's national championship: Ohio State. The question nobody can really answer at this time: What sort of sport will the Buckeyes or anyone else return to when they kick it off again seven months from now.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: In his hometown, Spurs' Victor Wembanyama dedicates a pair of new outdoor courts for kids to enjoy
item.description: LE CHESNAY, France (AP) — Victor Wembanyama stood on the center stripe of a new outdoor court in his hometown, his arms outstretched to their full 8-foot wingspan as he posed for a slew of photographers. He could not have seemed happier.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Chilean nationals arrested, linked to Joe Burrow home burglary
item.description: An SUV search reportedly found "an old LSU shirt and Bengals hat believed to have been stolen" from the incident.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Coco Gauff says she has more work to do after losing at the Australian Open. Djokovic beats Alcaraz
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Coco Gauff's retooled forehand and serve abandoned her in the worst way and at the worst time at the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State stars praise God after winning college football national title
item.description: Ohio State stars Will Howard, Jack Sawyer and Cody Simon each praised God and Jesus as the Buckeyes won the college football national title.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jake Paul puts Mike Tyson on his shoulders during inaugural ball
item.description: Jake Paul was seen putting Mike Tyson on his shoulders as it appeared any animosity between them was completely over following their November spectacle.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Maryland going into key conference stretch potentially without two of its top scorers
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (AP) — Maryland is going into a key stretch of its conference season with games against No. 12 Ohio State and top-ranked UCLA this week. The eighth-ranked Terrapins could be missing two of their top three scorers for those contests.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah closes homestand strong with 5-2 win over Winnipeg
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - After a slow start to their season-long 7-game homestand, the Utah Hockey Club finished it strong. Barrett Hayton scored and had two assists, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Winnipeg Jets 5-2 at Delta Center on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ohio State QB Will Howard played his best in run to national title, and set a record along the way
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Will Howard transferred to Ohio State to win a national championship, and he reached that goal by playing the best football of his career throughout the Buckeyes' four games in the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Late Ohio State field goal is a win for Buckeyes bettors in CFP title game victory over Notre Dame
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Jayden Fielding's 33-yard field goal with 26 seconds remaining did more than secure Ohio State's 34-23 victory over Notre Dame in the College Football Playoff title game on Monday night. It also handed Ohio State bettors the victory.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Indiana eliminates 25 athletic department jobs in preparation for revenue sharing, AP source says
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The new revenue-sharing model in college sports is forcing the Indiana University athletic department to cut costs — even if it means cutting jobs.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State VS. Notre Dame: Facts to know before the CFP Championship kickoff
item.description: The Buckeyes and Fighting Irish meet Monday night in the College Football Playoff national championship game at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, WGN 9

item.title: Travis Kelce makes NFL history in first game of three-peat quest
item.description: Once again, Travis Kelce has broken a record at Arrowhead Stadium after catching a pass from Patrick Mahomes.
item.dc:creator: Dillon Seckington, KTLA 5

item.title: Turnovers and depleted defense contribute to top-seeded Lions' quick playoff exit
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — The Detroit Lions had everything set up the way they wanted this time. After losing last season's NFC Championship Game at San Francisco, they went 15-2 to earn the NFC's top seed.
item.dc:creator: DAVE HOGG, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Texans' Kris Boyd flings helmet, gets penalized and then shoves his coach on first play vs. Chiefs
item.description: Texans cornerback Kris Boyd nearly shoved Houston special teams coach Frank Ross to the ground after the opening kickoff of their divisional playoff loss to the Kansas City Chiefs on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC players react to first week of practice
item.description: The "Chrome & Azul" are back on the training ground to finish off their first week of training, for the first time ever as a club.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks take losing streak into game against the Golden Knights
item.description: Vegas Golden Knights (29-13-3, in the Pacific Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (14-28-3, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Sammy Sosa gets warm reception for his reconciliation with the Chicago Cubs
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Sammy Sosa jogged onto the stage, carrying an American flag. The crowd cheered wildly. It was just like old times — only Sosa was dressed in a suit, and the scene occurred in a downtown hotel ballroom instead of Wrigley Field.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Several Chicagoland AMC locations to air the College Football Playoff championship game
item.description: CHICAGO — Notre Dame will face off against Ohio State on Monday in the College Football Playoff championship game in Atlanta, and while traveling to the game may not be an option for some, fans in Chicago can still get a taste of the larger-than-life action at some AMC theaters.
item.dc:creator: Gabriel Castillo, WGN 9

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get caught up on the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: How to watch the Australian Open on TV — In the
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah Valley wins on overtime buzzer-beater, 85-83
item.description: ARLINGTON, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - Texas native Kylin Green went the full length of the floor in five seconds and dished to Jackson Holcombe, who scored in the final second of overtime to lift Utah Valley to a thrilling 85-83 road victory over UT Arlington on Thursday night at College Park Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah's struggles at home continue with 5-3 loss to Rangers
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club are having a difficult time during its longest homestand of the season. The New York Rangers scored three goals in the third period to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 5-3 at Delta Center on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Basketball: Rancho Buena Vista 56, La Costa Canyon 51
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-Girls Basketball on Wednesday evening part of girls and boys doubleheader for league action. Camille Dake, Senior from RBV lead the way for the Longhorns. Great game that ended with the home team winning 56-51.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Keyonte George returns, but Jazz lose to Hornets, 117-112
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Down three starters, the Utah Jazz young players are getting a chance to shine these days. After playing very well for three quarters, the Jazz ran out of gas in the fourth and lost to the Charlotte Hornets Wednesday night, 117-112.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Murphy and Williamson carry the Pelicans to a 119-113 win over the Bulls
item.description: Trey Murphy III scored 32 points and Zion Williamson added 21 as the New Orleans Pelicans beat the Chicago Bulls 119-113 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
